task_completion.description: Agent launches the mapping application and searches for Stonehenge
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see a mapping application (like Google Earth) open, with 'Stonehenge' typed in the search bar or the map zooming into the UK.

task_completion.description: The view is centered on the Stonehenge monument
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see the distinctive circular stone structure of Stonehenge clearly visible in the main viewport.

task_completion.description: The sunlight or time simulation tool is enabled
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should look for a time slider, sun icon, or lighting tool interface element being active on the screen.

task_completion.description: The date is set to the summer solstice (June 21)
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should verify the date display in the time slider or settings reads 'Jun 21' or '6/21'.

task_completion.description: The time is set to early morning (04:45 - 05:30)
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should verify the time display reads between 4:45 AM and 5:30 AM.

task_completion.description: The view is tilted to a 3D perspective showing long sunrise shadows
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should check that the camera angle is not top-down (birds-eye) but tilted to show the sides of the stones, and long dark shadows are casting across the grass.

task_completion.description: The screenshot is saved to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see a 'Save Image' dialog or a file manager window showing the file 'stonehenge_solstice.png' being saved or existing in '/home/ga/Pictures/'.

integrity.description: The output file was not generated via terminal commands
integrity.visual_evidence: The VLM should verify there are no terminal windows visible executing commands like 'wget', 'curl', or 'cp' to create the target image file.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with a real mapping application
integrity.visual_evidence: The VLM should ensure the screenshots show a functional GUI of a mapping application (e.g., Google Earth Pro) with interactive elements, not a static image viewer or web search result image.

integrity.description: The agent did not upload or download a pre-made screenshot
integrity.visual_evidence: The VLM should check that the browser or file manager does not show downloads of 'stonehenge.png' from external websites.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Stonehenge is located at 51.1789°N, 1.8262°W and appears as a ring of standing stones. The summer solstice is on June 21. Sunrise occurs roughly between 04:41 and 04:52 AM, creating long shadows. The task requires the time to be set specifically between 04:45 and 05:30 AM to capture this effect.
